description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pymnn-windows that runs on push to master, feature/* branches and on pull requests to master, but only for pymnn/ and .github/workflows/pymnn_windows.yml paths. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment with concurrent runs cancelled. It checks out the code, sets up MSVC and Python 3.9, installs numpy, opencv-python and torch, then builds and tests pymnn.
